title: Kyiv: Power outage reported
description: Power restored to all Kyiv homes after Russia's overnight attack DTEK, Ukraine's largest private energy company, has restored electricity to 140,000 households in Kyiv that had been left without power after Russia's attack on the night of 1-2 June. Read the full article on our website
description_en: Power restored to all Kyiv homes after Russia's overnight attack DTEK, Ukraine's largest private energy company, has restored electricity to 140,000 households in Kyiv that had been left without power after Russia's attack on the night of 1-2 June. Read the full article on our website

title: Donetsk: Drone strike
description: Neva radar, Pantsir air defense, and a tugboat — Ukraine releases latest drone strike video hit list. Ukraine struck Russian military targets across occupied Crimea and Donetsk Oblast overnight, including two Pantsir air defense systems and a command post.
description_en: Neva radar, Pantsir air defense, and a tugboat — Ukraine releases latest drone strike video hit list. Ukraine struck Russian military targets across occupied Crimea and Donetsk Oblast overnight, including two Pantsir air defense systems and a command post.

title: Shelling near civilians
description: And here is the solution to the irritation with the tents: that night, a record number of people - more than 41,000 of them, almost 4,500 of them children - were sheltering from shelling at subway stations in Kyiv, reported the KSGA. But at the same time, citizens are still urged not to bring bulky items, including tents, to the subway during an emergency, as they can interfere with the free movement of passengers and hinder...
description_en: And here is the solution to the irritation with the tents: that night, a record number of people - more than 41,000 of them, almost 4,500 of them children - were sheltering from shelling at subway stations in Kyiv, reported the KSGA. But at the same time, citizens are still urged not to bring bulky items, including tents, to the subway during an emergency, as they can interfere with the free movement of passengers and hinder...
description_uk: А вот и разгадка раздражения палатками: этой ночью на станциях метро в Киеве укрывалось от обстрелов рекордное за последние годы количество людей - более 41 тысяч, из них почти 4500 детей, сообщили в КГГА. Но при этом всё равно призвали граждан не приносить во время тревоги в метро громоздкие вещи, включая палатки, поскольку они могут мешать свободному передвижению пассажиров и препятствовать...

title: Kharkiv: Evacuation ordered
description: Kharkiv Oblast expands mandatory evacuation zone, over 7,000 people to be relocated The Kharkiv Oblast Defence Council has expanded the mandatory evacuation zone to seven settlements in the Bohodukhiv district. More than 7,000 people are to be evacuated. Read the full article on our website

title: Dnipro: Attack attack
description: Death toll from Russian strike on Dnipro rises to 11 as bodies of woman and child recovered from rubble Rescue workers have recovered the bodies of a woman and a child from under the rubble of a destroyed building in Dnipro, bringing the death toll from the Russian strike to 11. Read the full article on our website

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Ukraine strikes Russia's Ilsky oil refinery for at least 16th time since start of full-scale war. Located roughly 500 kilometers (310 miles) from Ukrainian-controlled territory, the refinery is among the largest in southern Russia, producing nearly 6.6 million tons of fuel annually.
description_en: Ukraine strikes Russia's Ilsky oil refinery for at least 16th time since start of full-scale war. Located roughly 500 kilometers (310 miles) from Ukrainian-controlled territory, the refinery is among the largest in southern Russia, producing nearly 6.6 million tons of fuel annually.
description_uk: Ukraine strikes Russia's Ilsky oil refinery for at least 16th time since start of full-scale war. Located roughly 500 kilometers (310 miles) from Ukrainian-controlled territory, the refinery is among the largest in southern Russia, producing nearly 6.6 million tons of fuel annually.

title: Bucha: Drone strike near civilians
title_uk: Буча: удар безпілотників поблизу мирних жителів
description: Russia demands access to investigation into its own drone strike in Romania. Moscow has sought to deflect blame after Bucharest said a Russian Shahed-type drone injured two civilians in the Romanian city of Galati.

description: In the Shevchenkiv district of Kyiv, at the moment of arrival, a woman with 2 children ran for cover: she died on the spot, the children were hospitalized. A woman born in 1949 and a man born in 1977 also died there. At least 19 people were injured on the territory of the complex.
description_en: In the Shevchenkiv district of Kyiv, at the moment of arrival, a woman with 2 children ran for cover: she died on the spot, the children were hospitalized. A woman born in 1949 and a man born in 1977 also died there. At least 19 people were injured on the territory of the complex.
description_uk: В Шевченковском районе Киева в момент прилета женщина с 2 детьми бежала к укрытию: она погибла на месте, детей госпитализировали Там же погибли женщина 1949 года рождения и мужчина 1977 года. На территории комплекса ранены по меньшей мере 19 человек.

title: 700 missiles launched
description: The peculiarity of the strike on the night of May 2 was that more than half of the missiles were ballistic, - Ignat "It is similar to the strike that took place on May 24. In fact, we have about 700 missiles. The peculiarity of the strike is ballistics. A lot of ballistics. 33 classic ballistic missiles "Iskander-M" and in two waves the enemy struck with "Zircon". "Zircon" is anti-ship missile, but...
description_en: The peculiarity of the strike on the night of May 2 was that more than half of the missiles were ballistic, - Ignat "It is similar to the strike that took place on May 24. In fact, we have about 700 missiles. The peculiarity of the strike is ballistics. A lot of ballistics. 33 classic ballistic missiles "Iskander-M" and in two waves the enemy struck with "Zircon". "Zircon" is anti-ship missile, but...
description_uk: Особенностью удара в ночь на 2 мая было то, что более половины ракет были баллистическими, - Игнат "Похож на тот удар, который был 24 мая. Фактически у нас по количеству средств около 700. Много ракет. Особенность удара – баллистика. Очень много баллистики. 33 классические баллистические ракеты "Искандер-М" и в две волны враг нанес удары "Цирконами". "Циркон" – это противокорабельная ракета, но...

description: More than 500 employees of the State Emergency Service are involved in eliminating the consequences of the night Russian attack on our cities and communities. The main impact was on Kyiv, where dozens of residential buildings and other purely civilian infrastructure were again damaged. Unfortunately, we know about four dead. My condolences to all relatives and friends. Currently, 38 people are in the hospitals of the capital, all of them are provided with the necessary assistance. In Dnipro, the...

Основний удар був по Києву, де знову пошкоджено десятки житлових будинків та інша суто цивільна інфраструктура. На жаль, відомо про чотирьох загиблих. Мої співчуття всім рідним і близьким. Зараз у лікарнях столиці перебувають 38 людей, усім надається необхідна допомога. У Дніпрі триває...

title: Kyiv: Airstrike attack
description: Three people injured, houses damaged and fires erupt following Russian attack on Kyiv Oblast – photos Heavy overnight bombardment targeting multiple districts damaged houses, warehouses and cars, triggering several fires across Kyiv Oblast. Read the full article on our website

title: 73 missiles + 656 drones intercepted
description: The Air Force reports that 73 missiles and 656 drones of various types attacked Ukraine last night, of which 40 missiles and 602 UAVs were shot down ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. Dnipro, Kharkiv, Zaporozhye, Poltava and other regions were also attacked. A total of 729 means of air attack were recorded by the Air Force's radio engineering forces: - 8 anti-ship missiles 3M22 "Zircon" (areas...

Dnipro, Kharkiv, Zaporozhye, Poltava and other regions were also attacked. Также атакованы Днепр, Харьков, Запорожье, Полтавщину и другие регионы. Всего радиотехническими войсками Воздушных Сил зафиксировано 729 средств воздушного нападения: - 8 противокорабельных ракет 3М22 "Циркон" (районы...

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Update: Explosions again heard in Kyiv amid ongoing large-scale attack. Several explosions were again heard in Kyiv around 7:20 a.m. local time, according to Kyiv Independent journalists on the ground. Ukraine's Air Force warned of another potential wave of ballistic missile strikes as Russia's large-scale attack on the capital continues.

Several explosions were again heard in Kyiv around 7:20 a.m. local time, according to Kyiv Independent journalists on the ground. Ukraine's Air Force warned of another potential wave of ballistic missile strikes as Russia's large-scale attack on the capital continues.

title: Dnipro: 9 killed, 89 injured
description: Update: At least 9 killed, 89 injured across Ukraine overnight amid large-scale Russian attack. The casualty count stemming from Russia's overnight attack on various Ukrainian cities, including Kyiv, has grown across multiple cities as rescue effort remain ongoing. Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko said that four people were killed and 51 were injured in the capital, while officials in Dnipro reported...
